purpose: Implements PluginOptionsStore by reading/writing four keys ('MermaidEnabled', 'ScrollSyncEnabled', 'AutoOpenMarkdown', 'RenderDebounceMs') under section 'MarkdownPlusPlus' of the configured INI file via GetPrivateProfileIntW / WritePrivateProfileStringW. Also defines ClampRenderDebounceMs which constrains the debounce to [0, 1000] ms.
calls_out_to: Kernel32: GetPrivateProfileIntW / WritePrivateProfileStringW (Windows private-profile INI APIs)
invariants: Both Load and Save clamp renderDebounceMs through ClampRenderDebounceMs so on-disk values can never exceed [0, 1000].
Empty path_ -> Load returns defaults, Save no-ops; callers rely on this for first-run before NPPM_GETPLUGINSCONFIGDIR is available.
gotchas: WritePrivateProfileStringW caches changes in Windows' INI cache - changes may not be flushed to disk until the cache is forced or Notepad++ exits.
Booleans are stored as the strings "0" / "1" and read via GetPrivateProfileIntW with !=0; any non-zero integer counts as true.
